body.purpose: Reading text on home/speaker pages; system sans at 17px/1.7.

biblio-body.purpose: Charter serif reading text on events pages, 17px/1.55.

label.purpose: Mono metadata: eyebrows, tags, dates. Never voice.

motion.name: reduced-motion-kill
motion.purpose: Global kill-switch; any added motion must respect it.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Solid teal action; the RSVP/analyze verb.
components.html: RSVP to the next session
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-block; padding: 12px 22px; background: #0f5f57; color: #fff; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0a4b44; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #0f5f57; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-block; padding: 12px 22px; background: transparent; color: #0a4b44; border: 1px solid #e4dfd2; border-radius: 4px; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; text-decoration: none; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { border-color: #0f5f57; }

components.name: Eyebrow Label
components.description: Mono uppercase section marker in accent teal.
components.css: .ds-eyebrow { font-family: ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: 0.18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #0f5f57; }

components.name: Event Row
components.description: Baseline-aligned mono date + title row, hairline-ruled; the signature meetings list.
components.css: .ds-evt { display: flex; gap: 20px; align-items: baseline; padding: 15px 0; border-top: 1px solid #e4dfd2; border-bottom: 1px solid #e4dfd2; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; color: #1b1b1a; } .ds-evt-date { font: 600 13px/1.3 ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; color: #0f5f57; min-width: 74px; letter-spacing: 0.02em; } .ds-evt-t { font-size: 16px; }

components.name: Demo Card
components.description: Flat warm-panel card with hairline border; houses the in-browser ML demos.
components.html:
Transformers.js · DistilBERT ~65MB

Sentiment analysis

Runs entirely in your browser.
components.css: .ds-card { border: 1px solid #e4dfd2; border-radius: 8px; background: #fffdf8; padding: 22px; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-tag { font: 600 11px/1 ui-monospace, 'SF Mono', Menlo, monospace; letter-spacing: 0.08em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #6b6a63; } .ds-card-h { font-size: 17px; font-weight: 700; margin: 8px 0 12px; color: #1b1b1a; } .ds-card-p { margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #6b6a63; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: White field, hairline border, teal focus outline.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4dfd2; color: #1b1b1a; border-radius: 5px; padding: 11px 13px; font: 15px ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input:focus { outline: 2px solid #0f5f57; outline-offset: 0; }

components.name: Citation Card
components.description: Bibliography register's signature featured-event affordance; navy wash + 3px left rule.
components.html:
Next session

DeepSeek Technical Report

Wed Jul 15 · noon–2pm · The Frontier + Zoom
components.css: .ds-citation { border-left: 3px solid #234e70; background: #eef2f6; padding: 16px 20px; border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0; font-family: Charter, 'Bitstream Charter', Cambria, Georgia, serif; color: #1c1c1a; } .ds-cite-label { font-family: 'Berkeley Mono', ui-monospace, Menlo, monospace; font-size: 0.82rem; letter-spacing: 0.01em; text-transform: uppercase; color: #234e70; margin: 0; } .ds-cite-h { font-size: 1.15rem; margin: 0.15rem 0 0.25rem; } .ds-cite-p { margin: 0; color: #6d6d66; font-size: 0.95rem; }

components.name: Site Nav
components.description: Sticky translucent cream bar; serif wordmark, muted sans links.
components.html:
Deep Learning RTP
MeetingsAboutResources
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; padding: 16px 24px; background: rgba(247,244,236,0.92); border-bottom: 1px solid #e4dfd2; backdrop-filter: blur(6px); } .ds-nav-name { font-family: ui-serif, Georgia, serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; color: #1b1b1a; } .ds-nav-links { margin-left: auto; display: flex; gap: 22px; } .ds-nav-links a { color: #6b6a63; font-size: 14px; text-decoration: none; font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-links a:hover { color: #1b1b1a; }

narrative.overview: Everyone around one table with the paper in the middle. The system is warm, plain, and serious: paper-toned backgrounds, ink text, hairline rules doing the structural work, and a single accent spent where attention belongs. It reads like a well-kept study group, not a startup — rigorous, welcoming, unpretentious, in that order. The site carries two deliberate registers: the Front Door (home, speaker page) in warm cream with a spruce-teal accent, and the Bibliography (events pages) in cooler ink-on-paper with a citation-navy accent. They are siblings, not drift — but never mix their accents on one page.
keyCharacteristics: Paper tones + ink text; one accent per register, spent deliberately
Hairline 1px rules carry all structure; zero shadows
Serif display over sans (Front Door) or Charter serif throughout (Bibliography)
Monospace reserved for metadata: eyebrows, dates, tags
Quiet and bookish interaction — flat surfaces, small radii, whispered hovers

rules.name: The One Lamp Rule
rules.body: Each register owns exactly one accent and spends it like lamplight: metadata, dates, actions, focus. A second accent hue on the same page is forbidden; teal never appears on Bibliography pages, navy never on the Front Door.

rules.name: The Two Registers Rule
rules.body: Front Door (cream + teal) and Bibliography (paper + navy) are deliberate sibling identities. Keep each internally consistent; don't average them into one lukewarm palette. The Annals (history/, oxblood on paper) is a sealed third register: never restyle it, never borrow its palette for live pages.

rules.name: The Metadata Mono Rule
rules.body: Monospace marks machine-adjacent facts — dates, tags, eyebrows, model sizes — and nothing else. Body copy in mono is costume.

rules.name: The Hairline Rule
rules.body: If two areas need separating, draw a 1px rule in the register's line color. If a surface needs lifting, tint it one step. Shadows are prohibited.

dos: Do spend the register's single accent on metadata, dates, and actions only (The One Lamp Rule); everything else is ink and paper.
Do structure with 1px hairlines (#e4dfd2 / #d9d9d2) and one-step surface tints; keep every surface flat.
Do keep mono for metadata (dates, tags, eyebrows) at small sizes with wide tracking.
Do keep the existing prefers-reduced-motion kill-switch on any motion you add.
Do let proof carry the page: real meeting rows, the archive, working demos — claims never outrun evidence.
donts: Don't build anything resembling the hype-y crypto/AI landing: big claims, countdown urgency, 'join the revolution' copy.
Don't use the neon AI aesthetic: dark-mode gradients, glowing purple, glassmorphism-as-decoration, sci-fi chrome.
Don't add box-shadows, a second accent hue per page, or cross-pollinate teal onto Bibliography pages (or navy onto the Front Door).
Don't use gradient text, side-stripe accents on new components (the Citation Card is the one grandfathered, signature exception), or icon-topped identical card grids.
Don't exceed the ~760px prose column; this is a reading site, not a dashboard.
